title: Medical Social Worker (Home Care)
description:
COMPANY DESCRIPTION

Founded in 1976, Home Nursing Foundation (HNF) is a leading charity that provides home healthcare services in Singapore, regardless of our patients' ability to pay. Dedicated to all-round support for our patients, HNF delivers comprehensive care programmes to look after patients' emotional well-being and healthcare needs. Our HNF Wellness Day Care & Rehabilitation Centres offer an array of social activities, social support and holistic healthcare services to help our elderly stay independent in their own community.

RESPONSIBILITIES

  • Conduct biopsychosocial and financial assessments, including InterRAI, for clients and caregivers, identifying medical, functional, psychosocial and financial needs.
  • Develop care plans and coordinate follow-up actions to address client and/or caregiver's needs.
  • Work collaboratively with multidisciplinary, healthcare and community partners (doctors, nurses, therapists, Home Care staff, community partners) to ensure continuity, coordination and smooth care transitions.
  • Provide direct counselling, emotional support, and psychoeducation to clients and caregivers, to facilitate coping with illness, grief, loss, and life transitions.
  • Provide crisis intervention and make timely referrals to specialised services for complex or high-risk cases.
  • Conduct home visit independently or jointly with the Home Care team as required.
  • Maintain accurate, comprehensive, and timely documentation of assessments, interventions, care plans, and progress notes in accordance with professional standards and organizational policies.
  • Participate in departmental and organisational quality improvement, service development and programme evaluation activities.Support outreach, education and publicity to raise awareness and boost enrolment in department/organization's programmes.
  • Attend relevant training, supervision sessions, and casework discussions for continued professional growth.
  • Perform any other related duties as directed by the reporting officers.
QUALIFICATIONS
  • Degree in Social Work or a Graduate Diploma in Social Work.
  • Registered with Singapore Association of Social Work.
  • Experience in means testing and healthcare setting is advantageous
  • Conversant in local dialects and/or Malay, Mandarin, Tamil is advantageous
Please note that your application will be sent to and reviewed by the direct employer - Home Nursing Foundation

postedCompany.name: HYPERSCAL SOLUTIONS PTE. LTD.

hiringCompany.description:
Founded in 1976, HNF is the largest and most established home healthcare service provider in Singapore. It is also the only provider that operates islandwide in Singapore. HNF delivers comprehensive care programmes that are dedicated to our patients, regardless of their income level. From nursing to medical care, to looking after patients’ social well-being and other practical daily needs, we bring care and support into the homes of those in need.

Home is the best place to recover from or cope with an ailment. At HNF, we embrace our patients with all-round support they can depend on. We start by understanding our patients’ needs and by adopting a multidisciplinary case management approach. With our nursing, medical and network of partners, our holistic patient-centric home healthcare plans are individually tailored to meet the needs of each patient.

Quality patient care is paramount in our daily operations. We work towards improving the quality of life of our patients with their best interests at heart.
hiringCompany.name: Home Nursing Foundation
